Pro tip

Set up a Telegram integration first, then uploads and share links become much easier to reason about.

Activity timeline

A digestible timeline for uploads, integrations, retries, and link activity.

09:42
Remote import queued

launch-video.mp4 was imported from a direct URL into /campaigns/spring

09:18
Signed link created

A secure link was generated for annual-report-2024.pdf

08:55
Telegram integration connected

Primary Relay is healthy and ready for worker jobs

08:21
Folder selected

Operations moved active uploads into /design/source

© 2026 TeleDrive. Built for nerds who want storage workflows without ugly tooling.
